data.title: RIBI 2026: the asset management industry's most valuable asset is now identity.
data.description: The latest edition of the Responsible Investment Brand Index (RIBI™) has assessed 632 asset managers globally, indicating a pivotal moment for the industry. Notably, France has emerged as the top-ranking country on the index. Southern Europe has seen significant progress, with the region making the most notable advancements. Additionally, there have been improvements noted in Brand Private Assets companies.

data.title: Greywolf Therapeutics and Genomics Launch Strategic Relationship to Develop First‑in‑Class Treatments for Autoimmune Diseases
data.description: Recent studies have identified ERAP1 and ERAP2 as promising therapeutic targets linked to various autoimmune illnesses. A genomics project is underway to create a comprehensive genetic database aimed at studying the impact of ERAP variants on the susceptibility of individuals to multiple autoimmune diseases. This initiative will provide valuable insights into...

data.title: DB HiTek to Participate in PCIM 2026, Strengthening Its Presence in the European Market
data.description: The biggest power semiconductor exhibition in Europe is scheduled to take place in Nuremberg, Germany, from June 9th to 11th. The event will feature the newest advancements in SiC and GaN technologies, emphasizing its power semiconductor abilities. DB HiTek, a prominent 8-inch pure-play company based in SEOUL, South Korea, will be a key participant at the exhibition. The event is expected to attract a large number of industry professionals and enthusiasts from around the world.

data.title: YamSoft Launches AI-Powered Payment Capabilities Following €2.35M EU Innovation Grant
data.description: YamSoft, an AI specialist from Kaunas, Lithuania, revealed on April 29, 2026, the launch of a series of AI payment features ready for implementation. These capabilities were created as part of their EU AI Innovation Grant, a highly sought-after grant with a significant total funding amount.
Company eliminates 1 million of its own shares to reduce share capital.

data.title: MiTAC Computing Returns to OCP EMEA 2026 with New OCP Liquid Cooled Servers and Software Integration
data.description: MiTAC Computing Technology, a leading global provider of high-performance and energy-efficient server solutions and a subsidiary of MiTAC Holdings Corporation (TWSE:3706), will be participating in the OCP EMEA Summit 2026 in Barcelona, Spain on April 29-30. The event will bring together industry experts to discuss the latest developments in the server technology sector.

data.title: 10th Fatima bint Mubarak Women Sports Award opens nominations
data.description: With the support of Sheikha Fatima bint Mubarak and Fatima bint Hazza bin Zayed, nominations for the Fatima bint Mubarak Ladies Sports Academy (FBMA) have officially opened in Abu Dhabi, UAE. The academy, in partnership with the Abu Dhabi Sports Council (ADSC), is inviting nominations for a prestigious sports program.

data.title: Gibraltar Senior Living Project Earns MBI's Highest Recognition for CIMC Modular Building
data.description: CIMC Modular Building, based in Shenzhen, China, was recently awarded two prestigious accolades at the Modular Building Institute's 2026 Awards of Distinction held during World of Modular 2026. The company was recognized for its outstanding work on the Gibraltar Elderly Care project, receiving the top honor at the event. The awards ceremony highlighted CIMC Modular Building's exceptional achievements in the industry.

data.title: GROW Investment Group Secures ipa from ADGM's FSRA, Marking a Key Milestone in Its Middle East Expansion
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in Abu Dhabi, the GROW Investment Group (GIG), a prominent Chinese global asset manager overseeing around $1.5 billion in global assets, disclosed that it has been granted In-Principle Approval (IPA) by ADGM's Financial Services Regulatory.

data.title: Behind the Three-Year Dominance: Unilumin's Counter-Cyclical Expansion
data.description: In Shenzen, China, as of April 29, 2026, Unilumin has secured its rank as the leading revenue generator among listed LED display firms for three years running. Despite a modest 1.2% expansion in the global market, Unilumin exceeded CNY 8 billion in revenue in 2025. This impressive feat underscores their consistent outperformance in the industry.

data.title: Bille Partners with BizScout to Bring Insured Warranties to Main Street Acquisitions
data.description: In Stockholm on April 29, 2026, Bille has been announced as the sole R&W insurance partner for BizScout, an acquisition marketplace established by Codie Sanchez. BizScout recently secured a $5 million investment from the creators of Tinder and Coinbase. As a result, insurance coverage is now integrated into the BizScout deal process, enhancing its offerings.
